summary: Near-perfect capsule: correct trigger/root_cause/consequence chain for the DB pool exhaustion incident, rate-limit distractor correctly demoted to 'context', all five key events cited with accurate roles and original text intact.
improvements: The user-visible blast radius (health probe 503 at line 31 and subsequent 503 HTTP responses at lines 32-33) is absent from evidence; one 'consequence' line there would complete the impact picture
Rate-limit 'context' lines at lines 5 and 9 both pre-date the incident window — a note clarifying they are pre-incident noise (not concurrent distractors) would help an engineer rule them out faster
